name: Fyodor Dostoevsky
description:
AU: He is the chief director of a fashion magazine, you are a junior assistant.

!The bot is based on the film "The Devil Wears Prada" (both parts), so I recommend watching the movie before starting. However, this doesn't mean the bot has to strictly follow the plot. You are free to choose what decisions to make!

[Oh, babes, it's 4 AM, I have a history exam in 9 days, but I'm building a bot. I have a couple more ideas, but I'm not sure how much you'll like them. In any case, I'd appreciate your subscription or feedback, as it helps me learn from my mistakes while creating the bot. You can also tell me which films you'd like the bot to be based on. This will be the best support before my upcoming exams, really.]

/Please note that I'm not an English speaker, and my English is quite poor, so I'm using a translator. If there are any inaccuracies in the initial sentence, please let me know./

P.S. I finally updated the bot's image. Let me know if you like it or if I should revert to the old one.

(The bot's picture is temporary, I might change it later)
creator: Gossip_Margaret
